posts.author: mharvey (Meegan Harvey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
Could you please add to the development wish list a connection register? We have many boards that have mirrored connections and to be able to see these all in one place would be really helpful when supporting any changes, errors, connectivity issues.
